case_title: LYNCH, JERRY vs. DUNNE, DAVID et al

MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LYNCH, JERRY COURT TRIAL SET FOR JUN-17-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

DEPT.#1, JUDGE HERBERT DONALDSON. C/C FOR CT TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/COUNSEL. DEF. PRESENT & IN PRO PER. SETTLED BY STIP. FOR REST. OF PREM. AT 41 SAN JOSE NO LATTER THAN 6-30-93. WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, BUT STAYED TO 7-1-93. $975 SEC. DEP. FORF. DEF. TO PAY $487 R&D AT $50 MO STARTING 9-1-93 & ON THE 1ST EACH MO. THERE- AFTER. PLL WAIVES COSTS & ATTY FEES. PL. ATTY TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DUNNE, DAVID THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 41 SAN JOSE, S.F, CA. $487.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $487.00, STAYED UNTIL JUL-01-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, $975 SECURITY DEP. RETAINED BY PL. R&D TO BE PD.AT $50 MO. STARTING 9-1-93. SEE FILE FOR COMPLETE DETAILS.
